decisions.relationship_evidence: Reports a single childcare outbreak investigation using case finding, interviews, microbiology, and WGS; it does not conduct a surveillance-pattern analysis.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Not a lineage lead for descriptive surveillance-pattern analysis.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares influenza-season timing, duration, intensity, circulating viruses, and vaccine-effectiveness patterns across four countries.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete multi-country application of seasonal infectious-disease pattern analysis.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses 2011–2017 surveillance data to estimate and model temporal LGV positivity trends among MSM.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete infectious-disease surveillance trend analysis.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reconstructs a historical measles epidemic from archival documents rather than applying a surveillance-pattern analysis.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Historical outbreak study, not a lineage lead for this surveillance concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Analyzes four decades of publicly deposited Salmonella genomes to describe temporal frequencies of AMR genes and predicted resistance phenotypes.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete longitudinal infectious-pathogen pattern analysis.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Analyzes reported norovirus outbreaks from nine states over 2012–2020 and models temporal, seasonal, and setting-specific patterns.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application to outbreak-surveillance data.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses surveillance and laboratory-notification data to describe geographic, seasonal, demographic, species, and severity patterns of vibriosis.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete multi-country infectious-disease surveillance analysis.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Summarizes reported monkeypox cases across 41 countries, including notification trajectories, demographics, presentation, and transmission patterns.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete regional outbreak-surveillance application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: An observational secondary-transmission study comparing attack rates by setting and host factors, not a surveillance-pattern analysis.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Not a lineage lead for this exact concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Analyzes 2007–2023 surveillance notifications for temporal changes in IPD rates, clinical syndromes, serotypes, and vaccine coverage.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete regional surveillance-pattern application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Describes a single food-borne outbreak and its likely source without a broader surveillance-pattern analysis.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Single outbreak report, not a lineage lead for this concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Conducts a nationwide descriptive ecological analysis of pediatric pneumonia incidence and mortality across altitude strata and time.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete population-level infectious-disease pattern analysis.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Analyzes 2020–2024 scabies trends from a regional surveillance system and characterizes post-pandemic resurgence and underreporting.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete regional surveillance-trend application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares pre- and post-vaccine surveillance isolates to characterize decade-long and age-specific pneumococcal serotype trends.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete pathogen-surveillance pattern analysis.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Describes temporal, demographic, seasonal, lineage, and resistance-mutation patterns among pulmonary tuberculosis cases and isolates.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete infectious-disease epidemiological and molecular-pattern application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses ecological data, regressions, ARIMA models, and spatial analysis to characterize 2013–2023 HIV incidence patterns across countries.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete multinational infectious-disease trend analysis.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Models medication-refill trajectories among treated tuberculosis patients rather than population surveillance patterns.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Clinical care-engagement analysis, not a lineage lead for this concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reviews 32 years of confirmed hospital cases to describe changing clinical, diagnostic, treatment, geographic, and outbreak-period patterns.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete longitudinal infectious-disease monitoring application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Integrates national surveillance records and epidemiologic, clinical, and genomic data to characterize long-term spatiotemporal CHIKV patterns.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete national infectious-disease surveillance-pattern synthesis.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Clusters longitudinal symptoms within a clinical cohort; it does not analyze infectious-disease surveillance patterns.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Cohort phenotyping study, not a lineage lead for this concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Performs a two-decade secondary analysis of WAHIS and ProMED reports to characterize global anthrax trends and reporting differences.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete global infectious-disease surveillance analysis.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates sensitivity and specificity of micro-CATT and ELISA against parasitology-based classification and evaluates outbreak-detection performance by simulation.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit diagnostic-performance evaluation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses simulation to demonstrate severe prevalence-dependent bias in PISA-derived sensitivity and specificity estimates and recommends abandoning PISA.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct methodological diagnosis of bias in a diagnostic-accuracy algorithm.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Identifies Dengue-4 infections missed by the NS1 assay and concludes that its sensitivity and specificity require reevaluation.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit evaluation of test sensitivity and surveillance under-detection.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Re-evaluates microscopy-positive malaria diagnoses using nested PCR and quantifies false positives, species mismatches, and missed mixed infections.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit diagnostic-performance comparison.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates laboratory-confirmed dengue prevalence among suspected pediatric cases but does not evaluate or calibrate test accuracy.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Applied burden study rather than an accuracy-method lineage source.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Retests dengue-like cases for leptospirosis to estimate missed disease burden without evaluating assay accuracy or calibration.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Misclassification application, not a source for this exact accuracy-method concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Describes how sampling practices and diagnostic procedures affect recorded gonorrhoea rates but does not estimate or calibrate test accuracy.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Case-finding history rather than an exact diagnostic-accuracy lineage lead.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares real-time PCR with culture, quantifies their relative sensitivity, and estimates the underestimation factor from culture-only testing.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit diagnostic-performance and under-detection evaluation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops gender-specific fetal head-circumference reference charts and equations and compares their classification behavior with the Hadlock chart.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a diagnostic reference-calibration method.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates malaria RDT performance against microscopy and nested PCR, reporting sensitivity, specificity, predictive values, and false results.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit comparative diagnostic-accuracy study.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Quantifies Lyme-disease under-detection using serological sensitivity and specificity, cross-border incidence, and independent surveillance indicators.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit diagnosis of surveillance-test and case-criteria under-detection.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a leptospirosis diagnostic score and reports discrimination, sensitivity, specificity, predictive values, and likelihood ratios.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development and initial calibration of a diagnostic prediction method.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies sequential corrections for reporting completeness, diagnostic sensitivity and specificity, and screening coverage to chlamydia case rates.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete infectious-disease application of accuracy and bias calibration.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops and bootstraps a rubella prediction nomogram and reports its AUC and calibration.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development and calibration of a diagnostic prediction model.

decisions.relationship_evidence: The title explicitly reports that cross-reactivity in a CDC-specified specimen control can produce false negatives and underreporting.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit diagnosis of a diagnostic-control performance failure.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares clinical breakpoints with epidemiological and livestock-specific cutoffs and shows interpretation-dependent under- and over-reporting of AMR.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit calibration comparison for susceptibility interpretation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Provides a mathematical and Monte Carlo framework for estimating time-dependent infectiousness risk following a negative PCR or antigen test.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicitly introduces a diagnostic-risk calibration framework.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies a modified semi-Bayesian method to correct Brazilian COVID-19 prevalence for incomplete testing and imperfect test accuracy.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete infectious-disease application of probabilistic bias correction.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses published test parameters inside a Lyme-disease burden microsimulation but does not evaluate or calibrate diagnostic performance.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Disease-burden model, not a lineage lead for this exact concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Measures pediatric seroprevalence with several assays but does not provide a formal comparative accuracy or calibration analysis.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Seroprevalence application rather than a diagnostic-accuracy lineage source.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a standardized framework and large data compendium for benchmarking robustness and cross-reactivity of infection signatures.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development for diagnostic-performance benchmarking.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Presents and simulates estimators and confidence intervals that correct seroprevalence for imperfect sensitivity and specificity under complex sampling.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit statistical-method development for test-error calibration.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops renal-function reference intervals in pregnancy, not infectious-disease diagnostic-accuracy or test-calibration methods.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Outside the exact infectious-diagnostic concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Assesses acute-phase chikungunya RT-PCR utility and shows that nearly all PCR-positive samples were missed by IgM testing.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit comparative assessment of diagnostic detection performance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Constructs a wastewater-based machine-learning prediction model with reported sensitivity and specificity to estimate underreported COVID-19 cases.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a calibrated surveillance-prediction method.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses PET-CT as a sensitive reference benchmark and reports AUCs for three chest-x-ray CAD systems in asymptomatic tuberculosis.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit diagnostic benchmark and longitudinal validation study.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Benchmarks six multimodal LLMs against corneal specialists for diagnosis, treatment, and triage, reporting accuracy and agreement.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit diagnostic-accuracy benchmarking study.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reviews existing CHIKV assays and explicitly identifies variability in sensitivity and specificity as a cause of misreporting and underreporting.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Broad disease review rather than a focused methodological or diagnostic lineage source.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reviews an underrecognized clinical presentation and differential diagnosis without evaluating test accuracy or calibration.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Clinical awareness review, not a lineage lead for this exact concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates CSF β-D-glucan sensitivity and specificity and assesses whether serial values track treatment response.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit diagnostic-accuracy and monitoring-performance study.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Field-validates the ReEBOV rapid test against two RT-PCR assays and reports sensitivity, specificity, and reader agreement.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit field validation of an infectious-disease assay.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Field-evaluates the GeneXpert Ebola assay against the Trombley RT-PCR assay in blood and buccal-swab specimens.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit comparative assay-performance evaluation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares enterovirus detection yield across stool, rectal-swab, throat-swab, and sequential specimen-testing strategies.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit diagnostic-yield comparison.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses simulation to compare hepatitis E RNA testing strategies and quantify their expected prevention of transfusion transmissions.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit performance assessment of assay-testing strategies.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Meta-analyzes agreement between QFT-GIT and tuberculin skin testing and concludes that the tests are not interchangeable.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit comparative evaluation of diagnostic assays.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Performs a head-to-head comparison of five SARS-CoV-2 antigen tests and reports sensitivity, specificity, and predictive values.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit comparative diagnostic-performance benchmark.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Validates point-of-care drug-level immunoassays using limits of detection, uncertainty regions, reference-test agreement, and pharmacokinetic simulation.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit assay-validation study.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Benchmarks 13 viral-metagenomic diagnostic pipelines using clinical datasets and compares sensitivity, predictive value, and detection limits.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit multicandidate diagnostic-pipeline benchmark.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Benchmarks RNA sequencing for vaccine transcriptomics rather than validating a diagnostic assay or comparing diagnostic yield.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Technical vaccine-study benchmark outside the exact diagnostic-assay concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Explicitly identifies itself as a corrigendum correcting the Vacc-SeqQC benchmarking article.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Formal correction of the assigned assay-benchmark record.
named_source_mentions: The Vacc-SeqQC project: Benchmarking RNA-Seq for clinical vaccine studies

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops and qualifies a reagent-and-virus benchmarking panel and demonstrates it by comparing four SARS-CoV-2 antigen tests.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development of a uniform assay-benchmarking resource.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a mock reference panel to benchmark 12 clinical viral-metagenomics wet-lab protocols for sensitivity, specificity, and quantitative performance.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit multicenter diagnostic-protocol benchmark.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops and validates a multiplex PCR assay and compares its detection with microscopy and single-plex PCR.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development and comparative validation of a diagnostic assay.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates high-risk HPV test performance against cytology and biopsy, reporting sensitivity, specificity, predictive values, and missed dysplasia.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit comparative diagnostic-performance study.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Conducts a multicountry diagnostic-accuracy study of RT-LAMP against RT-qPCR in nasopharyngeal and saliva specimens.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit multicountry assay validation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Benchmarks the Nanostring platform against NAATs for multiple wastewater biomarkers and characterizes sensitivity and operational limitations.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit comparative analytical-performance evaluation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Benchmarks four wastewater concentration and extraction methods across eight respiratory viruses and compares recovery sensitivity.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit diagnostic-processing yield comparison.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Prospectively field-evaluates an mpox antigen RDT against PCR and reports sensitivity, specificity, and subgroup performance.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit multicenter field diagnostic-accuracy study.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Benchmarks Illumina and Oxford Nanopore WGS workflows for accuracy, assembly quality, taxonomic identification, ARG detection, and cgMLST resolution.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit comparative validation for clinical microbiology workflows.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reproduces and benchmarks nine published LAMP assays, finding major discrepancies in specificity, sensitivity, and detection limits.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit empirical diagnosis of assay reproducibility and performance.
named_source_mentions: Minimum Information for Publication of Quantitative Real-Time PCR Experiments guidelines

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares short- and long-read metagenomic workflows using mock and clinical samples and reports diagnostic agreement, sensitivity, and missed pathogens.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit sequencing-based diagnostic-performance benchmark.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Tests whether CLABSI cases were systematically misclassified as secondary bloodstream infections in mandatory surveillance data.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit reporting-validity and case-misclassification assessment.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Retests clinically suspected malaria or typhoid cases for arboviruses and demonstrates substantial misdiagnosis and underreporting.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit assessment of diagnostic classification validity.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares tetanus notifications with hospitalizations and contrasts Italian and EU case definitions to assess underreporting and comparability.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit reporting- and case-definition-validity analysis.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares hospital-record-identified HUS cases with surveillance notifications to estimate surveillance sensitivity under different notification criteria.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit surveillance case-ascertainment validation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares NAAT-positive gonorrhoea cases with culture results and evaluates whether culture-positive surveillance isolates represent all diagnosed patients.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit assessment of diagnostic-yield and surveillance representativeness.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares laboratory-based and clinically compatible polio definitions and quantifies cases missed under the laboratory-only definition.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Direct case-definition validity assessment.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Validates Ghana's syphilis surveillance testing strategy against a traditional algorithm and reports overestimation and low predictive value.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit surveillance-testing validity study.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Audits laboratory selection and testing algorithms and shows that restricted Giardia testing likely causes underreporting.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit reporting-validity audit of diagnostic algorithms.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Shows that prior travel-based Giardia selection criteria would have excluded 93% of laboratory-confirmed cases.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit validation of diagnostic selection criteria.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Describes clinical characteristics of Seoul hantavirus disease to raise awareness but does not validate a case definition or reporting process.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Clinical description rather than a validity study.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates enhanced hepatitis B criteria by rediagnosing reported acute cases and measuring changes in incidence classification and positive predictive value.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit assessment of diagnostic and reporting validity.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses sentinel laboratory testing during fever-rash outbreaks to reveal substantial national misdiagnosis and underreporting.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit surveillance reporting-validity assessment.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Quantifies how measurement rounding, gestational-age reporting, and alternative microcephaly definitions alter surveillance prevalence.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit measurement and case-definition validity analysis.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Demonstrates that genital-only sampling would miss nearly half of chlamydia infections detected through multisite testing.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit assessment of diagnostic protocol completeness.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares facility-reported susceptibility with updated CLSI breakpoints and quantifies underreported carbapenem nonsusceptibility.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit reporting-validity assessment against updated interpretive criteria.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares telemedicine and in-person surgical-wound assessments and finds lower reported infection rates with remote follow-up.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit assessment of infection-ascertainment validity by follow-up mode.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Measures catheter-component contamination in suspected sepsis cases but does not validate a surveillance case definition or reporting process.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Clinical contamination study, not an exact validity lineage lead.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Validates two EHR-derived chronic-HCV case definitions against chart review using sensitivity, specificity, PPV, and NPV.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit electronic case-definition validation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Links national hospitalization and laboratory registries to quantify RSV underreporting and diagnostic-code misclassification.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit reporting and classification-validity study.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates a two-step CDI reporting algorithm and shows that exclusion of NAAT-positive/toxin-negative treated cases causes underreporting.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit surveillance reporting-algorithm validity assessment.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Tests dengue-suspected specimens for hepatitis A and E and demonstrates misclassification caused by overlapping clinical manifestations.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit evaluation of clinical diagnostic misclassification.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Directly identifies inconsistent diagnosis and the absence of a standard TDR-infection definition as barriers to valid rate estimation.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Literature review providing explicit case-definition guidance and identifying requirements for a more robust definition.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops and validates a new ARI phenotyping algorithm, comparing its case capture and exclusions with the prior algorithm.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development and validation of a surveillance case-identification method.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Retests dengue-negative febrile patients for leptospirosis and demonstrates underdiagnosed cases in the study population.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit evaluation of disease misclassification and under-ascertainment.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares laboratory-confirmed and clinically compatible mumps estimates and shows bias from a clinical-only surveillance definition.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit surveillance case-definition validity assessment.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops an automated SARI surveillance system, selects among six ICD-10 case definitions, and evaluates reporting completeness and timeliness.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development and evaluation of a surveillance case definition.

decisions.relationship_evidence: A molecularly confirmed seronegative brucellosis case directly exposes sensitivity limitations in Mexico's confirmed-case definition and recommends updating it.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit case-based diagnosis of a surveillance-definition failure.
named_source_mentions: Manual of Standardized Procedures for Epidemiological Surveillance in Mexico

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares old and revised CLSI breakpoints and quantifies antimicrobial-susceptibility misclassification and masked resistance.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit reporting and interpretive-validity assessment.
